name: Alpine Trail 30L Backpack
description: A 30-litre daypack for fast, light hikes. Ventilated back panel, rain cover included, 980 g.

name: Summit Pro 65L Backpack
description: A 65-litre trekking pack for multi-day tours. Adjustable harness, hip-belt pockets, 1.9 kg.

name: Stormshield Hardshell Jacket
description: A 3-layer waterproof hardshell for serious weather. Fully taped seams, helmet-compatible hood.

name: Featherlight Down Jacket
description: A packable 800-fill down jacket for cold, dry conditions. Packs into its own pocket, 320 g.

name: Trailbreeze Summer Tee
description: A quick-dry technical tee for warm-weather hikes. Merino blend, odour-resistant.

name: Granite GTX Hiking Boot
description: A waterproof mid-cut hiking boot with a grippy Vibram sole. Solid ankle support for rough terrain.

name: Rivercross Trail Runner
description: A lightweight trail-running shoe with fast drainage for stream crossings. 280 g per shoe.

name: Nightfall -5C Sleeping Bag
description: A 3-season down sleeping bag rated to -5 C comfort. Mummy cut, 1.1 kg, compresses small.

name: Skyridge 2P Tent
description: A freestanding 2-person tent, 2.2 kg packed. Two doors, two vestibules, fast pitch.

name: Pathfinder GPS Watch
description: A GPS watch with topographic maps and a 40-hour tracking battery. Barometric altimeter.

name: Glacier 1L Insulated Bottle
description: A 1-litre vacuum-insulated stainless bottle. Keeps drinks cold for 24 h, hot for 12 h.

name: Beacon 400 Headlamp
description: A 400-lumen rechargeable headlamp, 78 g. Red night mode and a 60-hour low setting.
